overview: Chain File is a decentralized document management app built on the Internet Computer. Users can securely upload, preview, share, and download files using unique access codes. Features include 1 GB free storage, encrypted file storage, ICP crypto payments for expanded capacity, file history with on-chain hashes, and real-time analytics.
features: Secure file upload with auto-generated access codes
File preview and download (PDF, images, text)
Decentralized storage on the Internet Computer
1 GB free storage per user with crypto payment unlock
ICP wallet payments via Plug, Stoic, and Internet Identity
File history with timestamped events and on-chain hash links
Tabbed dashboard with Documents, Upload, Analytics, and History
Account dropdown with Dashboard navigation and logout
Custom metallic 3D logo with matching browser favicon
